app.title: AI Agent Installation Decision & Security Guide
app.subtitle: Security Assessment Tool

welcome.title: Welcome to AI Agent Installation Decision Guide
welcome.description: Answer a few simple questions to help you choose the right AI Agent and assess security risks

q1.title: What is your use goal?
q1.description: What task do you want to complete with an AI Agent?

automation.title: Automate Web Tasks
automation.desc: Fill forms, click buttons, data scraping

q2.title: How do you want to achieve this goal?
q2.description: Different implementation methods have different security requirements

q3.title: What environment will you run it in?
q3.description: Environment choice directly affects security assessment results

q4.title: Do you have code audit capabilities?
q4.description: Understanding script behavior is the foundation of secure usage

yes.title: Yes
yes.desc: Can understand code logic and potential risks

q5.title: Have you set a daily API limit?

budget.title: What is your project budget?
budget.desc: This helps recommend suitable expert services

medium.title: Medium Budget
medium.desc: Willing to pay for professional services

recommendation.claudeCode: Claude Code - Focus on code development, debugging, and refactoring
recommendation.openclow: OpenClaw - Focus on web automation and task execution

notRecommended.title: Not Recommended - Security Risk Too High
notRecommended.issues: Your configuration has the following issues:
notRecommended.option1: Seek professional security expert help to configure a secure environment
notRecommended.option2: Use web-based AI services (like Claude Web, ChatGPT) to avoid local installation
notRecommended.option3: Resolve the above security issues before considering local AI Agent

recommendation.environmentWarning: Warning: Running AI Agent on main work computer poses security risks. Please follow the security recommendations below.

networkExposure.title: Network Interface Exposure
networkExposure.desc: AI Agent's WebSocket or API not bound to local address (127.0.0.1) may lead to RCE.

credentialLeak.title: Sensitive Credential Leak
credentialLeak.desc: API keys, tokens hardcoded or exposed via environment variables.
credentialLeak.mitigation: Use secret management services, avoid storing credentials in code

excessivePermissions.title: Excessive Permissions
excessivePermissions.desc: AI Agent has more system permissions than needed.
excessivePermissions.mitigation: Follow least privilege principle, limit file system and network access

maliciousPackage.title: Malicious Packages
maliciousPackage.desc: Fake GitHub releases or npm packages may contain malicious code.
maliciousPackage.mitigation: Download only from official repos, verify GPG signatures

dependencyAttack.title: Dependency Chain Attack
dependencyAttack.desc: Compromised open-source packages or outdated dependencies.
dependencyAttack.mitigation: Update dependencies regularly, use security scanning tools

promptInjection.title: Prompt Injection
promptInjection.desc: Malicious websites can steal cookies via iframe or CSS spoofing.
promptInjection.mitigation: Use separate browser profile, review sessions regularly

underestimateRisk.title: Underestimating Technical Risk
underestimateRisk.desc: Non-technical users may underestimate AI Agent risks.
underestimateRisk.mitigation: Understand AI Agent capabilities, use under professional guidance

overtrust.title: Over-trusting Automation
overtrust.desc: Blindly trusting AI output without verifying security.
overtrust.mitigation: Always review AI-generated code and operations

ignorePrivacy.title: Ignoring Data Privacy
ignorePrivacy.desc: Entering sensitive business data without considering risks.
ignorePrivacy.mitigation: Avoid entering sensitive data, use local deployment

apiOverrun.title: API Cost Overrun
apiOverrun.desc: No API limit set may lead to unexpected high bills.
apiOverrun.mitigation: Set daily/monthly spending limits in API provider console

hiddenCosts.title: Ignoring Hidden Costs
hiddenCosts.desc: Overlooking learning curve, debugging time, maintenance costs.

securityIncidents.title: Security Incident Costs
securityIncidents.desc: Incidents may cause data leaks, business interruption, reputation damage.
securityIncidents.mitigation: Include security in budget planning, buy insurance

apiSecurity.title: API Security Risks
apiSecurity.desc: OWASP API Security Top 10 covers broken authentication, authorization, data exposure.

accessControl.title: Access Control Failure (A01)
accessControl.desc: Authenticated users can perform unauthorized actions.

cryptoFail.title: Cryptographic Failures (A02)
cryptoFail.desc: Sensitive data not encrypted or using weak algorithms.

footer.privacy: 🔒 All data processed locally, never uploaded to any server
